title: Library Identifier
description: The schematic symbol library and physical geometry library file formats use library identifiers. See https://dev-docs.kicad.org/en/file-formats/sexpr-intro/index.html#_library_identifier

library_nickname.description: The nickname of the library in the symbol or physical library table. The library nickname is not stored in the library files because a library cannot know what the assigned library table nickname is in advance.

entry_name.description: The name of the symbol or physical geometry in the library.  Only the entry name is saved in the library files.
